'''matala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pya|pya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pya|pya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| matala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || mætælæth || mætælæj || mætælæsh || mætælæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || matatalath || matatalaj || matatalash || matatala
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || matalath || matalaj || matalash || matala
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || mataflafth || mataflafj || mataflafsh || mataflaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || matalatha || matalaja || matalasha || matalaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || matalath || matalaj || matalash || matala
|-
| [[Possessive]] || matalathal || matalajal || matalashal || matalakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || matalaathatha || matalaajaja || matalaashasha || matalaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || matalathan || matalajan || matalashan || matalakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || matalathaoro || matalajaoro || matalashaoro || matalakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
